data.body: COMPLETE (8fdd6ba3, b325da5f, 79de92d5, ad30433f — pushed to main). Generic list exposes the criteria list-epics filtered by: --min-children, --unblocked/--blocked, and an OPT-IN children_count (with_children_count / --with-children-count) — kept opt-in to preserve the show==list==search single-reducer invariant (f026). list-epics is now a thin wrapper: deprecation warning + one generic epics call + one generic P0-bugs call -> {p0_bugs, epics}, no bespoke reduction; the bash ticket-list-epics.sh is dead (Tier-E cleanup). Deprecation surfaced at CLI (stderr), library (DeprecationWarning), MCP (docstring); removed from 'rebar help' overview + CLAUDE.md + per-subcommand help marked DEPRECATED so agents don't reach for it. Tests: 14 exhaustive filter tests + invariant restored + schema/MCP/list-epics bash suites; full interface tier 245 green. Closing.
